methods.name: Peer-Median
methods.skip_reason: insufficient narrow peer set in Space & Aerospace (found 0 same-stage, 0 adjacent-stage, 0 similar-tier; need ≥3)
methods.rationale: 11 same-sector peers exist in Space & Aerospace, but none of the narrow filters (same-stage / adjacent-stage / similar-valuation-tier) yielded ≥3 datapoints. Falling back to all-sector median would be misleading.

methods.name: Public-Comp Anchoring
methods.skip_reason: target revenue not on file (private companies rarely disclose)
methods.rationale: Public Space & Aerospace P/S median is 25.8x across 6 tickers. Cannot apply without target's revenue.

data.narrative:
Orbital Inc. is a seed-stage Space & Aerospace company founded by Euwyn Poon and backed by a16z Speedrun. The valuation universe comprises 5 public comparables (RKLB, PL, LUNR, ASTS, SATL) and 8 private peers including SpaceX, Sierra Space, Planet Labs, Impulse Space, and Apex Space.

Two standard triangulation methods do not apply here. Peer-median analysis fails due to insufficient narrow-stage comparables; while 11 same-sector peers exist, filtering for same-stage, adjacent-stage, or similar-valuation-tier companies yields fewer than 3 datapoints in any bucket, making sector-wide medians uninformative. Public-comp anchoring cannot proceed because Orbital's revenue is not disclosed—a constraint common to private companies. The public Space & Aerospace cohort shows a median P/S multiple of 25.8x across 6 tickers, but without target revenue this metric cannot be applied.

The lack of stage-specific private comparables and absence of financial data severely constrain quantitative valuation. A defensible range cannot be triangulated from the available inputs. Proceeding would require either (1) direct disclosure of Orbital's revenue or near-term ARR projections, (2) identification of seed-stage Space & Aerospace companies with disclosed valuations, or (3) alternative methods such as cost-of-capital or discounted cash flow analysis supported by operational milestones. The analysis recommends obtaining revenue guidance or clarifying comparability criteria before establishing a valuation recommendation.
